meta.title: Fear & Greed • Crypto Panel
meta.description: A Binance-style Chrome extension sidepanel that detects the current pair, shows Fear & Greed across timeframes, and calculates a clean Risk score — right where you trade. Works on Binance, OKX, Bybit and TradingView.

home.title: Cinematic crypto sentiment,
home.subtitle: A professional Chrome Extension for crypto traders. Instantly detect the active pair, visualize Fear & Greed across timeframes, and get a clean Risk score directly on your chart.
home.trustLine: Fast, minimal, and built for Binance, OKX and Bybit.
home.videoCaption: Live preview of the extension sidepanel
home.howItWorksSub: Install the extension, get your API key, and paste it into Settings. Quota and plan status update automatically.
home.step1Text: Open Binance, OKX and Bybit and launch the Extension. The pair is detected automatically from the URL.
home.step2Text: Choose a plan on Pricing. After checkout, your key appears in the Dashboard and can be used instantly.
home.step3Text: Go to Settings in the extension, paste the key, and press Check key. Your plan badge and daily quota will show up.

hero.title: Simple plans,
hero.subtitle: The extension is the product UI. The website handles pricing, billing and API key management. Pay with MetaMask and get your key instantly.

checkout.title: Pay with MetaMask
checkout.subtitle: Today: UI + flow. Next step: real smart contract / backend verification.

s1.title: Connect wallet
s1.text: User connects MetaMask. We show network and address.

s2.title: Send payment
s2.text: User pays for PRO/VIP. We show pending/confirmed status.

s3.title: Receive API key
s3.text: After confirmation, Dashboard shows the API key.

demo.title: MetaMask connection (UI)
demo.text: We can add a real MetaMask integration later via wagmi + viem. For now it’s clean layout and buttons.

q1.q: Do I need the website if I have the extension?
q1.a: Yes — the extension is the product UI. The website handles pricing, payments, and key management.

q2.a: Fast crypto checkout without card processing. We can add card payments later.

q3.q: How do I get the API key?
q3.a: After payment, the dashboard shows your key. Then paste it into extension Settings.

q4.q: Can I cancel or change plan?
q4.a: Yes. We’ll implement upgrade/downgrade and show current quota/plan status in the dashboard.

hero.title: How to use
hero.subtitle: Everything you need: install the extension, get an API key, and troubleshoot common issues.

quick.title: Start in 2–3 minutes
quick.subtitle: Recommended: install → get key → paste in Settings.

s1.title: Install extension
s1.text: Install from Chrome Web Store. Open Binance/TradingView and use the sidepanel.

s2.title: Get API key
s2.text2: Your key will be available in

s3.title: Paste key in Settings
s3.text: Open extension Settings → paste key → click Check key. Plan and quota will update automatically.

extension.title: Where do I enter the key?
extension.text: Open sidepanel → Settings → API key → Check key. If valid, you’ll see plan and quota (e.g., PRO • 3/50).

website.title: Where do I get the key?
website.text: On the site, your key appears in

p1.title: I see “—” instead of data
p1.text: Make sure you are on supported pages (Binance/Bybit/OKX/TradingView). Change symbol and click Refresh. Check internet/VPN.

p2.title: Check key says invalid / unauthorized
p2.text: Paste key without extra spaces. Press Clear → paste again → Check key. If revoked, generate a new key in Dashboard.

p3.title: Limit reached / quota exceeded
p3.text: Daily quota is exhausted. Wait for reset or upgrade your plan on

p4.title: Plan badge shows wrong plan
p4.text: Press Check key to force validation. Refresh and change symbol to update quota.

example.title: What a valid response looks like
example.subtitle: Example only — actual format depends on backend.

s1.title: Is it safe to paste the key?
s1.text: Yes. The key is for API access and quota only. Don’t share it with third-party sites. Revoke and generate a new key if needed.

s2.title: What data do we store?
s2.text: Minimal: Install ID for anti-fraud + your API key stored in browser sync storage. We don’t store exchange data.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade?
cta.subtitle: Go PRO/VIP, pay via MetaMask, and get your key for the extension.
